alerts.title: Scheduled System Maintenance
alerts.content: The client portal will be offline on Saturday, May 2nd, from 10:00 PM to 2:00 AM for critical infrastructure upgrades.

alerts.title: Weather Advisory: Heavy Rainfall Expected
alerts.content: Please ensure your greenhouse drainage systems are clear. Heavy rainfall is predicted across the Rift Valley region over the next 48 hours.

news.title: New Climate-Smart Farming Modules Launched
news.content: We have added three new consultation modules focusing on water conservation and organic crop protection.

news.title: Upcoming Agricultural Workshop in Nakuru
news.content: Join our agronomists on May 15th for a hands-on workshop on optimizing drip irrigation efficiency.

news.title: Q1 Agricultural Yield Report Released
news.content: Our comprehensive analysis of climate-smart farming trends and crop yields for Q1 2026 is now available.
